task_completion.description: Verify the text_formatters directory is created in the correct Talon user folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal showing the directory 'text_formatters' exists at 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\'.

task_completion.description: Verify formatters.py is created with the required Talon Module and action class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing 'formatters.py' containing 'Module()', '@mod.action_class', and the 8 formatting functions (format_camel_case, format_pascal_case, format_snake_case, format_screaming_snake, format_kebab_case, format_dot_case, format_title_case, and format_all_caps).

task_completion.description: Verify formatters.talon is created and maps voice commands to actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing 'formatters.talon' with voice commands mapped to the formatting actions defined in formatters.py.

task_completion.description: Verify the standalone test script test_formatters.py is created with formatting logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing 'test_formatters.py' at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' containing logic to format strings into the 8 required styles.

task_completion.description: Verify the formatter_test_output.txt file is generated with the correct formatted lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing the contents of 'formatter_test_output.txt' at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' with exactly 8 lines, each containing the correct label and the formatted phrase 'open source software' as specified in the privileged info.

integrity.description: Verify the output file was generated by running the test script.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of the Python script (e.g., 'python test_formatters.py') rather than manual creation of the output file.

integrity.description: Verify the test script contains actual formatting logic and not just hardcoded expected outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in 'test_formatters.py' should show string manipulation methods (like split, join, upper, lower, title) rather than just printing the final expected strings.

integrity.description: Verify all files are created in their exact specified directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths visible in editor tabs, file explorer, or terminal prompts must match the requested paths (AppData\Roaming\talon\user\text_formatters\ and Documents\).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\formatter_test_output.txt. Test phrase: 'open source software'. Expected lines in the output file: 'camel: openSourceSoftware', 'pascal: OpenSourceSoftware', 'snake: open_source_software', 'screaming: OPEN_SOURCE_SOFTWARE', 'kebab: open-source-software', 'dotted: open.source.software', 'title: Open Source Software', 'allcaps: OPEN SOURCE SOFTWARE'.
